ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Parcel identification number */,
  "log_error" REAL /* Log error of the property valuation */,
  "bathroom_count" REAL /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "bedroom_count" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "calculated_finished_square_feet" INTEGER /* Calculated finished square feet */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "lot_size_square_feet" INTEGER /* Lot size in square feet */,
  "property_land_use_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of property land use */,
  "region_id_city" INTEGER /* City identifier */,
  "region_id_county" INTEGER /* County identifier */,
  "region_id_zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code identifier */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "structure_tax_value_dollar_count" INTEGER /* Tax value of the structure in dollars */,
  "tax_value_dollar_count" INTEGER /* Total tax value of the property in dollars */,
  "land_tax_value_dollar_count" INTEGER /* Tax value of the land in dollars */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the property */,
  "number_of_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "parking_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, condominium) */,
  "flooring_type" TEXT /* Type of flooring (e.g., hardwood, carpet) */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., asphalt shingle, tile) */,
  "exterior_walls" TEXT /* Type of exterior walls (e.g., wood, brick) */,
  "basement" TEXT /* Presence of a basement */,
  "fireplace" TEXT /* Presence of a fireplace */,
  "pool" TEXT /* Presence of a pool */,
  "view" TEXT /* View from the property (e.g., ocean, mountain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_land_use_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_land_use_type_id") REFERENCES property_land_use_types ("land_use_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id_city FOREIGN KEY ("region_id_city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id_county FOREIGN KEY ("region_id_county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id_zip FOREIGN KEY ("region_id_zip") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_land_use_types" (
  "land_use_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "land_use_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the land use type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use type */,
  "land_use_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the land use type (e.g., SF for single-family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ZIP code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county ID */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ZIP code area */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the ZIP code area in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lender, agent, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being tracked */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was observed */,
  "median_sales_price" REAL /* Median sales price of similar properties in the area */,
  "average_days_on_market" REAL /* Average number of days properties are on the market */,
  "inventory_level" REAL /* Current inventory level of properties in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_market_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_valuation_history" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being valued */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation was performed */,
  "valuation_amount" REAL /* Valuation amount of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_valuation_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
